default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on GrowthX's content strategy for Imubit, discuss progress, and align on future directions.](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is creating high-performing, evergreen content based on Imubit's communications, events, and use cases, focusing on process optimization and workforce transformation](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Content strategy targets specific verticals (e.g., oil & gas, cement) and addresses key objections (e.g., ROI proof)](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [New focus on workforce skills, AI adoption, and potential future product terms (e.g., agentic AI)](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Imubit is evaluating new verticals, with LNG, biofuels, and renewables showing strong potential](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - ["Stalking" Imubit across platforms (LinkedIn, webinars, events) to identify key terms and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Translating Imubit's voice into evergreen content that compounds over time](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Expanding content across verticals (e.g., oil & gas, cement industry)](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Utilizing call transcripts and competition gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Focusing on process optimization, margins, ROI, and workforce transformation](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

### High-Performing Content Examples

  - ["Golden batch for the chemical industry" article performing well](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Content on specific metals (e.g., gold, copper) in the mining industry](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Ethanol article in renewable fuels category showing good results](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

### Workforce Transformation Content

  - [New pillar focusing on skills and mindset needed for successful AI implementation](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Examples: "7 AI Skills That Build the Future-Proof Plant Operator", "How AI Optimization is Transforming Workforce Development"](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [Addressing challenges in attracting young workforce to manufacturing](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Using stat-backed claims from reputable sources (e.g., PwC, Harvard Business Review)](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Organizing content into 4 topic clusters: Industrial AI and Digital Transformation, Optimization and Operational Efficiency, Sustainability/Safety/Compliance, Empowering the Workforce](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Balancing high-volume keywords with niche terms (40 monthly searches) for strategic advantage](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)

### Imubit Vertical Analysis

  - [Tim shared a framework for assessing new vertical fit](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Factors considered: process-intensive nature, digital culture, energy efficiency, growth phase, price volatility, executive momentum](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Top potential verticals: LNG, biofuels/renewables, metals/mining](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Lower priority: pharma, food & beverage (due to regulatory constraints and price stability)](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)

### Content Management and Collaboration

  - [GrowthX uses a Content OS to manage published and upcoming articles](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Shared Notion space for meeting notes, context, and resources](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Clear distinction between Imubit's blog (opinion pieces) and GrowthX-created articles](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send meeting recap and links to all shared resources](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Tara to get access to GrowthX's content management systems for review and idea generation](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [Tara to collaborate closely with GrowthX on messaging stack and frameworks](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Dan to focus on optimizing existing content across channels](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Explore content ideas around 2026 predictions for AI process optimization](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Continue focus on renewable fuels keywords and content](https://fathom.video/share/XxJsdRqysmHUxp6EEvvXx1DBMdbACw8b?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)

action_items.description: Forward vertical assessment framework + strategy team research notes to Mariana/GrowthX team
Review GrowthX content/resources once received; prepare to collaborate on messaging stack & frameworks
Send meeting recap + links to all content/resources shown (content OS, Notion space, persona deep dive) to Tara
